written_feedback: Anya consistently delivers high-quality work ahead of schedule. Her ownership of the ingestion pipeline this quarter was outstanding and she mentored two junior engineers along the way. A real asset to the team.

Marcus is technically capable but has missed several internal deadlines this cycle, which created downstream delays. Communication around blockers needs to improve. I'd like to see more proactive status updates next quarter.
Great working with you on the data platform. The code reviews were thorough and fair.
